semantic_blueprint.root_cause_hypothesis: Requests to data nodes were not ordered by node role priority, potentially leading to suboptimal query routing and performance.
semantic_blueprint.fix_logic: Introduced a deterministic ordering of shard requests based on node roles by defining a node role priority list, sorting shards accordingly, and ensuring request maps preserve this order.
semantic_blueprint.patch_intent_summary: Ensure that requests to data nodes are sent in a deterministic, role-prioritized order to optimize query execution and resource utilization.

hunk_chain.summary: Imports DiscoveryNodeRole to access node role constants for ordering.
hunk_chain.connects_to_next: Allows use of DiscoveryNodeRole constants in the new ordering logic and static list introduced in the next hunk.

hunk_chain.summary: Imports Comparator and LinkedHashMap to support custom sorting and order-preserving maps.
hunk_chain.connects_to_next: Enables the implementation of the core ordering logic and the use of ordered maps in subsequent hunks.

hunk_chain.summary: Defines NODE_QUERY_ORDER (node role priority list) and adds static methods to order shards by node role priority.
hunk_chain.connects_to_next: Provides the core ordering mechanism that is then invoked in the main request scheduling logic in the next hunk.

hunk_chain.summary: Replaces direct addition of shard IDs with a call to the new order() method, ensuring pendingShardIds are ordered by node role priority.
hunk_chain.connects_to_next: Ensures that the pendingShardIds queue is populated in the correct order, which must be preserved when mapping nodes to shard IDs in the next hunk.

hunk_chain.summary: Changes nodeToShardIds from HashMap to LinkedHashMap to preserve the insertion order of nodes (and thus the role-prioritized order).

before: * and executing these computes on the data nodes.

x-pack/plugin/esql/src/main/java/org/ela.code_snippet: final Map<DiscoveryNode, List<ShardId>> nodeToShardIds = new LinkedHashMap<>();

adapted_code_hunks.hunk_text: @@ -59,6 +59,17 @@ -* and executing these computes on the data nodes. - */ abstract class DataNodeRequestSender { + + /** + * Query order according to the + * node roles. + */ + private static final List NODE_QUERY_ORDER = List.of( + DiscoveryNodeRole.SEARCH_ROLE.roleName(), + DiscoveryNodeRole.DATA_CONTENT_NODE_ROLE.roleName(), + DiscoveryNodeRole.DATA_HOT_NODE_ROLE.roleName(), + DiscoveryNodeRole.DATA_WARM_NODE_ROLE.roleName(), + DiscoveryNodeRole.DATA_COLD_NODE_ROLE.roleName(), + DiscoveryNodeRole.DATA_FROZEN_NODE_ROLE.roleName() + ); private final ClusterService clusterService; private final TransportService transportService;
